title: Blåhaj - Remake
description:
An unofficial remake version of Blåhaj Mod for Forge 1.12.2. 
Soft toy, shark mod, 16px.
body:
# Blåhaj - Remake
## Soft toy, shark mod, 16px, for Forge 1.12.2.
This is an unofficial remake version of [Blåhaj Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/blahaj) for Forge 1.12.2.  
It added 3 items: Blue Shark, Gray Shark and Bread Pillow.  
The mod is making and some functions haven't implemented yet.  
Such as players' animations and the way to get Gray Shark.

The icon of this project is the Blobhaj by [Heatherhorns](https://www.weasyl.com/~heatherhorns), and is licensed under [Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).
